description: Timestamped snapshots of build failure categorization. Each snapshot records the state at a point in time.

snapshots.notes: 109 families fixed: 104 Playwrite (fontprimer monorepo support) + 5 EduAuVic (hb-subset missing). 4 PlaywriteNZ variants are byte-identical.

ninja-type-error category dissolved: 9 families now build successfully (3 byte-identical: geologica, gluten, jost; 6 compiler-version: adventpro, commissioner, dmmono, hubotsans, monasans, nunito, robotoflex, urbanist), 2 became timestamp-diff (elmssans, snpro), 3 remain as gftools-fontsetter-bug (zalandosans variants). New: sciencegothic byte-identical, briemhand compiler-version. master-incompatibility +3 (cairo, playfairdisplay, playfairdisplaysc), source-file-missing +1 (recursive).

snapshots.note: Post-recompare batch: 186 families rescued from build-failure by re-running comparisons on existing build outputs
